CustomField.description: Please note: The data stored in this field is linked to the HomeKeeper National Data Hub. Do not change this field or hide it from the layout. This field is being copied from the related Income Source with the highest Gross Annual Income (where "Do Not Include in Eligibility Income" is not checked). Tip: Edit the largest related Income Source record to make changes.
CustomField.inlineHelpText:
This field is being copied from the related Income Source with the highest Gross Annual Income (where "Do Not Include in Eligibility Income" is not checked).
Tip: Edit the largest related Income Source record to make changes.
CustomField.label: Occupation Description
